# Real Elite Contracting

> Veteran-owned general contractor serving West Virginia's Eastern Panhandle,
> Frederick County MD, Winchester VA, and Loudoun County / Northern Virginia.
> Remodeling and exterior craftsmanship — "Military Precision. Civilian Excellence."

Real Elite Contracting is a licensed and insured general contractor operating across
West Virginia, Maryland, and Virginia. The company is veteran-owned and is pursuing
SDVOSB (Service-Disabled Veteran-Owned Small Business) certification — that certification
is in progress, not yet awarded. There is no publicly published founding date, and the
company does not display fabricated review ratings: star/aggregate ratings appear only
when mirrored from the verified Google Business Profile.

## Contact & facts
- Phone: (681) 534-5515
- Email: info@realelitecontracting.com
- Base: Martinsburg, WV 25401 (Eastern Panhandle)
- Hours: Mon–Fri 7:00 AM–6:00 PM, Sat 8:00 AM–2:00 PM
- Free written estimates; a real project lead responds within one business day.
- Instant AI roof quote: https://www.realelitecontracting.com/instant-roof-quote

## Services
- Roofing (replacement, repair, storm/insurance): https://www.realelitecontracting.com/services/roofing
- Siding & stone exterior: https://www.realelitecontracting.com/services/siding
- Decks & outdoor living: https://www.realelitecontracting.com/services/decks
- Kitchen remodeling: https://www.realelitecontracting.com/services/kitchens
- Bathroom remodeling: https://www.realelitecontracting.com/services/bathrooms
- Basement finishing: https://www.realelitecontracting.com/services/basements
- Home additions & in-law suites: https://www.realelitecontracting.com/services/additions
- Whole-home remodeling: https://www.realelitecontracting.com/services/remodeling
- Exterior repairs: https://www.realelitecontracting.com/services/exterior-repairs
- General repairs & handyman: https://www.realelitecontracting.com/services/handyman
- Paving & seal coating (with A+ Paving): https://www.realelitecontracting.com/paving

## Proof
- Project portfolio (real completed jobs, before/after, materials): https://www.realelitecontracting.com/projects
- Review Center (reviews linked to the projects behind them): https://www.realelitecontracting.com/reviews
- How we work (the process): https://www.realelitecontracting.com/process

## Service areas
- WV Eastern Panhandle: Martinsburg, Inwood, Charles Town, Ranson, Hedgesville, Shepherdstown
- Maryland: Frederick, Hagerstown
- Virginia: Winchester, Leesburg, Ashburn, Loudoun County, and Northern Virginia luxury markets
  (McLean, Great Falls, Vienna, Reston, Middleburg, Old Town Alexandria)
- Full list: https://www.realelitecontracting.com/service-areas

- Kitchen remodel cost (WV/MD/VA): https://www.realelitecontracting.com/blog/kitchen-remodel-cost-wv-md-va-2026
